title: - Sentence structure & grammar basics.
content:
- Sentence structure & grammar basics.
- Identifying audience and purpose in a piece of writing.
- Elements of strong narrative writing.

📌 **Recommended Readings for the Quiz:**
- *Week 1 | The Importance of Using Proper Grammar, Punctuation, and Spelling (Presentation)*
- *Week 1 | The Writing Process (Presentation)*
- *Chapter 12 Section 1 - Sentence Writing & Structure*
- *Chapter 6 Section 2 - Narrative Writing*

---

### **VI. Independent Work Time & Mini-Conferences**

1. **Student Work Time**
- Students will work at their own pace to complete the **quiz** and **reading comprehension questions**.
- They are encouraged to revisit **Week 1 lectures and textbook readings** if needed.

2. **Instructor Role: Rotating Mini-Conferences**
- The instructor will **rotate around the room**, checking in with students one-on-one.
- Conferences can focus on:
- Reviewing student progress on assignments.
